mapper.select: select receiver_id from messenger_alarm where alarm_id = #{alarmId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messenger_alarm (messenger_id, receiver_id, is_read, url, url2, created_at) VALUES (#{messengerId}, #{receiverId}, 0, #{url}, #{url2}, NOW());
mapper.select: SELECT ma.alarm_id AS alarmId, '메신저' AS alarmName, ma.receiver_id AS receiverId, ma.is_read AS isRead, ma.created_at AS createdAt, ma.url AS url, ma.url2 AS url2, m.content AS alarmDesc, e.name AS alarmSource FROM messenger_alarm ma JOIN messenger m ON ma.messenger_id = m.messenger_id JOIN employee e ON m.sender_id = e.emp_id WHERE ma.receiver_id = #{empId} ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC

SELECT ma.alarm_id AS alarmId, '메신저' AS alarmName, ma.messenger_id AS messengerId, ma.receiver_id AS receiverId, ma.is_read AS isRead, ma.created_at AS createdAt, ma.url AS url, ma.url2 AS url2, m.content AS alarmDesc, -- 🔥 메시지 내용 추가 e.name AS alarmSource -- 🔥 보낸 사람 이름 추가 FROM messenger_alarm ma JOIN messenger m ON ma.messenger_id = m.messenger_id JOIN employee e ON m.sender_id = e.emp_id WHERE ma.receiver_id = #{empId} AND ma.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) -- 🔥 최근 30일 기준 ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC;
select count(*) from messenger_alarm where receiver_id = #{empId} and is_read = 0
mapper.update: update messenger_alarm set is_read = true where receiver_id = #{empId}
